steps.title: Spot the series pattern
steps.content: The existing semicolon after Barry Sharpless's description and the word “and” before Morten Meldal signal a three-item series separated by semicolons: Item 1; Item 2; and Item 3.

steps.title: Complete the series structure
steps.content:
A semicolon after Stanford correctly separates Carolyn Bertozzi from Morten Meldal within this pattern.
  • A provides no boundary (leaving the structure ambiguous)
  • B uses a comma (which contradicts the established semicolon convention)
  • C uses a colon (which introduces rather than separates items)
.

That is the correct answer.
